sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the exact 101 signed Q15 FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.fir_pair_sum: Combinational symmetric sample pre-adder for mirrored FIR taps.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_mac: Combinational symmetric multiply-accumulate engine using 50 mirrored pairs plus the center tap.
sub_modules.fir_output_scale: Combinational Q15 normalization stage using arithmetic right shift by 15.
